overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban environment at night, featuring neon-lit streets, narrow alleys, and stairways. The scene transitions from an underpass area through commercial alleys with vending machines and food stalls, up stairs to an upper level, and into a covered market area. The footage is from a video game with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass at night. The camera moves forward along a sidewalk next to an empty multi-lane road with red traffic lights visible in the distance. A construction worker in a yellow vest stands near a doorway on the left. The scene features urban infrastructure including a concrete planter, vending machines, and a building with prominent blue neon hotel signage.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower pedestrian alley lined with commercial establishments. An outdoor food stall with bright lighting and green stools occupies the right side, where a patron sits eating. The 'MARK 24' storefront with red neon accents appears on the left, and a large yellow digital billboard hangs overhead. The concrete overpass structure recedes to the left as the camera moves deeper into the alley.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide concrete stairway leading upward. A striking red and purple mural covers the left wall, while a large digital billboard displaying glitchy patterns stands on the right. Traditional paper lanterns hang overhead. The camera begins ascending the stairs, leaving the lower alley behind as it transitions to the upper level of the city.

passing by pedestrians and approaching the overpass structure ahead

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a narrow upper-level alley illuminated by purple and green neon lights. A large 'KIROSHI' advertisement glows at the far end. Concrete benches line the right wall where a person sits, while another pedestrian with red hair walks toward the camera. The camera moves forward through this enclosed passage toward an overpass structure visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market area under the overpass with food vendors

passing by blue vending machines and food stalls in the market corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered market area beneath the highway overpass, characterized by green fluorescent lighting and concrete support pillars. Blue vending machines line the left side while food stalls operate on the right. A pedestrian with bright green hair passes by on the left. The environment feels enclosed and bustling with market activity, transitioning from the narrow alley to this semi-covered commercial space under the infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate concrete underpass into a vibrant, multi-level cyberpunk market. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past a construction worker and blue neon hotel signage along a quiet, multi-lane road. As the camera pushes forward, the open road gives way to a narrow pedestrian alley filled with bright food stalls, red neon storefronts, and a large yellow digital billboard. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends a wide concrete stairway flanked by a purple mural and glitchy displays, leaving the lower district behind to enter a purple-lit upper alley where pedestrians pass beneath a glowing Kiroshi advertisement. Finally, the path leads into a covered market area characterized by green fluorescent lighting and concrete pillars, transitioning from the enclosed passage into a bustling commercial space lined with blue vending machines and food stalls.
